fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 36-year-old Asian American female with schizophrenia for routine visit.
fields.Subjective: Patient arrived appearing well-groomed and positive. Reports excellent adherence to aripiprazole 15 mg every morning using daily routine. States feeling well. No hallucinations for five months. No paranoid ideation. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 125 lbs. Working full-time as accountant, performing well. Mood 'good' rated 7/10. Lives with parents. Enjoys yoga and meditation. Attending support group monthly. One year sober from all substances. Building career stability. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. Lisa Chang, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Professionally dressed, excellent grooming, calm demeanor

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Lives with parents; employed full-time; one year sober; engaged in wellness activities.
Assessment_and_Plan: Excellent medication adherence and symptom control.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Lisa Chang, MD, Psychiatrist — Asian Professionals Wellness, 2341 Business Drive, San Jose, CA 95110, Phone: (555) 338-7729, Fax: (555) 338-7730
